title: Why NextGenerationEU might become the next generation’s problem
summary_full: Calls are mounting for the EU to roll over €650 billion in Covid recovery debt. But will ‘frugal’ countries, including Germany and the Netherlands, lift their veto?
summary_public: Calls are mounting for the EU to roll over €650 billion in Covid recovery debt. But will ‘frugal’ countries, including Germany and the Netherlands, lift their veto?
